script_text: Right there on the cover — by Dr. Mia Orion! That's the author's name.
voice_direction: Warm teacher voice. Pronounce 'Dr.' as 'Doctor' and say 'Mia Orion' clearly.

script_text: Dr. Orion wants us to learn about planets and rockets. That's her message!
voice_direction: Warm teacher voice. Pronounce 'Dr.' as 'Doctor'. Emphasize 'planets and rockets'.
